name: procurement managers at small marketing agencies processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers at small marketing agencies processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late payments, leading to service disruptions. We automate invoice reconciliation instead of manual invoice reconciliation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers at small marketing agencies processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of vendor invoices leading to errors and delays

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual reconciliation of vendor invoices leading to errors and delays
